# tfe_organization_run_task

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `url` (String)

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `category` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `hmac_key` (String, Sensitive)
- `hmac_key_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) HMAC key in write-only mode
- `hmac_key_wo_version` (Number) Version of the write-only HMAC key to trigger updates
- `organization` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Service-generated identifier for the task
